name: I got hurt by a forklift on the job, do I qualify for workers comp in Ogden?
description: Yes, Utah workers' comp covers on-job forklift injuries regardless of fault if reported timely.

mainEntity.name: I got hurt by a forklift on the job, do I qualify for workers comp in Ogden?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Utah workers' comp covers on-job forklift injuries regardless of fault if reported timely.
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, if the accident happened during your employment duties, Utah workers' comp covers medical bills and lost wages for forklift injuries.[5] Context: These are no-fault systems, meaning your or coworker's fault doesn't bar benefits unless intoxication is proven. Key factors: Must prove injury arose out of and in course of employment; common in warehouses. Practical guidance: Report within 180 days; get all treatment authorized by insurer. Consult an attorney if denied.
